channel.title: How to add google tag manager in specific page?
channel.description:
Hello,
How to add google tag manager code for specific page (thank you page)? e.g http://localhost:3000/thank-you/
I know we can setup package in frontity.settings.js but it code load in all pages. my question i want to add only in thank you page.
Kindly please help us soon!!
Thank you, Pramod

item.title: How to add google tag manager in specific page?
item.dc:creator: pramod.r
item.description:
Hello,

How to add google tag manager code for specific page (thank you page)?
e.g http://localhost:3000/thank-you/

I know we can setup package in frontity.settings.js but it code load in all pages.
my question i want to add only in thank you page.

Kindly please help us soon!!

Thank you,
Pramod

Read full topic
item.source: How to add google tag manager in specific page?
